name: Whoopee Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs and vanilla to the butter mixture, beating well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture in three additions, alternating with milk. Mix until just combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 400°F for 7-8 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks.
Filling:
1. In a large bowl, cream together shortening and vanilla.
2. Add marshmallow fluff and confectioners' sugar, mixing until smooth.
3. Once the cookies are completely cooled, place two cookies on a plate.
4. Fill with about 1 1/2 teaspoons of the filling to make whoopee pies.
